strengths: 15+ years of fullstack experience with strong TypeScript/Node.js and React work at Optilyz, RIDE, and re:cinq
Hands-on AI agent development: MCP code generators and agentic-workflow frameworks at re:cinq
Deep testing culture: TDD practitioner, authored test frameworks (Fluent-Asserts, Trial), created testing courses and workshops
concerns: No explicit Nest.js or Vitest experience; frontend history leans more Ember.js than React
Kotlin absent and Java exposure is limited/dated; Python not listed despite multi-language requirement
Authentication/authorization and security best-practices experience not explicitly evidenced on the resume
response.justification: The role's core competencies are senior fullstack delivery in TypeScript/Node/React, testing expertise, cloud/containers, databases, multi-language proficiency, and AI agent development. The candidate exceeds the 6+ year bar with over a decade of fullstack work, including TypeScript, React, MongoDB, and AWS CDK at Optilyz and TDD/CI/CD craftsmanship at RIDE. AI agent development is directly evidenced by MCP code-generator and agentic-workflow tooling at re:cinq, and containerization by Docker/Kubernetes deployment of GISCollective. Testing expertise is exceptional (authored assertion libraries and a test runner, taught Selenium/TDD courses), though Vitest and Nest.js specifically are not mentioned. Gaps are secondary-stack items: no Kotlin, thin Java, no Python, and no explicit auth/security work. Strong primary-stack and AI-agent evidence with only secondary-skill gaps yields a high fit score.
